programme.title: Terminal
programme.desc: In the dark heart of a sprawling, anonymous city, Terminal follows the twisting tales of two assassins carrying out a sinister mission (Max Irons & Dexter Fletcher), a teacher battling a fatal illness (Simon Pegg), an enigmatic janitor (Mike Myers)...

programme.title: Stigmata
programme.desc: A priest from the Vatican is sent to visit a woman who's showing signs of stigmata. The priest comes to find that the lady is truly possessed by something.

programme.title: Severance
programme.desc: Forget office politics, only the smartest will survive this bloody office outing.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Greatest: Best of Season II WPT Jack Binion World Poker Open
programme.desc: We revisit the conclusion of Season Two's Jack Binion World Poker Classic in Tunica, Mississippi.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Greatest: Best of Season V WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic
programme.desc: We head back to the conclusion of Season Five's Five Diamond World Poker Classic from the Bellagio Hotel in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Greatest: Best of Season IX WPT Doyle Brunson Five Diamond World Poker Classic
programme.desc: We head back for the thrilling conclusion of the Season Nine Doyle Brunson Five Diamond World Poker Classic at the Bellagio Hotel.

programme.title: The Young Nurses
programme.desc: Kitty, Michelle and Joanne are lively young nurses who work at a large hospital and give the sexiest treatment you've ever seen in The Young Nurses.

programme.title: Orgy of the Dead
programme.desc: A couple driving to a cemetery looking for inspiration for a horror story encounters the dancing dead.

programme.title: Eugenie De Sade
programme.desc: Eugenie, a shy young woman, lives with her stepfather, a famous writer of erotica. After reading one of his books, she develops an attraction to him. Sensing her desire, he pulls Eugenie into his twisted world of seduction and dark obsessions.

programme.title: The House That Dripped Blood
programme.desc: Robert Bloch, the author of Psycho, presents a quartet of terrifying tales. (1971)

programme.title: Joe and Max
programme.desc: True story of boxers Joe Louis and Max Schmeling and their enduring friendship.

programme.title: Hoodlum
programme.desc: 1930's New York. The black community of Harlem faces the same indignities as countless millions of refugees. If the seeds of Harlem's urban power would not grow in the White city, the Black underground would form to take control.

programme.title: 6 Below
programme.desc: An adrenaline seeking snowboarder gets lost in a massive winter storm in the back country of the High Sierras. Starring: Josh Hartnett, Mira Sorvino, Sarah Dumont. It is based on the book Crystal Clear by Eric LeMarque and Davin Seay.

programme.title: Fargo
programme.desc: Things go awry when car salesman Jerry Lundegaard (William H. Macy) hires two thugs to kidnap his wife. Soon, the very pregnant and chipper Police Chief Marge Gunderson (Frances McDormand) takes the case. Is she up for the challenge? You betcha.

programme.title: Colors
programme.desc: As members of the Los Angeles Police Department's elite anti-gang unit, a veteran cop and his new partner are called in to assist with the crackdown against the mounting gang violence in the barrios and slums of East Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Iceman
programme.desc: The story of Richard Kuklinski, the notorious contract killer and family man. When finally arrested in 1986, neither his wife nor daughters had any clue about his real profession.
A family man struggling to hold it all together discovers a hidden parlor that offers a solution...sexbots.

programme.title: Dune Warriors
programme.desc: After the end of the world, Earth is a thirsty planet ruled by vicious warlords. One woman is brave enough to fight back; she bands together five warriors to save her town and their precious water.

programme.title: Don't Look Deeper
programme.desc: In near-future California, high-school senior Aisha discovers a dark secret about herself. As she begins to wonder whether she's human, she goes from dreams of graduation to running for her life.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Charlotte, Elvis and Jack
programme.desc: Actress Eileen Davidson's Wheaten terrier puppy Charlotte, plays too rough with her son. Two other dogs react to household triggers, the garbage disposal and shiny floors.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Homes, Sweet Homes
programme.desc: A fresh inside peek into some of the Timber Kings most spectacular and unique finished homes and the challenges encountered building them.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Truck Overboard
programme.desc: Joel wrecks an 18-wheeler during a winter build in Ontario, Beat and André sell a thousand year old tree to an eccentric Arkansas millionaire.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Beat’s Arkansas house build is in trouble when delivery trucks arrive out of order, Bryan Jr. remodels a local bar for a penny-pinching friend, and Peter turns inventor to solve a work yard problem.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Heir Apparent
programme.desc: Bryan Jr. takes his son to Missouri and they manage to assemble a house despite themselves, Beat builds a Western-style saloon for a meatball millionaire and his racecar-driving girlfriend.

programme.title: Odd Thomas
programme.desc: In a California desert town, a short-order cook with clairvoyant abilities encounters a mysterious man with a link to dark, threatening forces. Starring: Anton Yelchin, Ashley Sommers, Leonor Varela, Willem Dafoe

programme.title: The Human Centipede III (Final Sequence)
programme.desc: An insane prison warden and his sidekick hatch a plan to simultaneously cut costs and deter prisoner revolt in their overpopulated, underfunded jail

programme.title: Creepshow 2
programme.desc: Three more bone-chilling tales that include a vengeful wooden Native American, a monstrous blob in a lake, and a hitchhiker who wants revenge and will not die. Starring:George Kennedy, Lois Chiles, Domenick John

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian

programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Rocket Method

programme.title: Snooker 900

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt begins in the Hell Creek Formation of South Dakota, with one of the greatest palaeontology discoveries ever made. However, the find brought nothing but trouble and suspicion to those who uncovered it.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Edinburgh: A look at one of Scotland's most popular paid tourist attraction. With a slew of sieges to its name, it is no surprise that the site boasts some formidable defences.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Leeds: Dan Jones explores the 900-year history of the beautiful Leeds Castle in Kent, from its origins as a royal Saxon family's manor to a 20th-century retreat for the rich.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: York: Dan explores the history of York's castle, from the Viking Jorvik and the Normans, to the dark days of the anti-Jewish pogrom and the imprisonment of the Knights Templar.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones is exploring one of the oldest, and most fearsome castles ever built: The Tower of London.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Historian Dan Jones visits the South East of England, home to Britain's greatest defensive fortress: Dover Castle.

programme.desc: Sexual problems plague an affluent Malibu family until a backpacking free spirit (Shauna O'Brien) arrives.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Janet's hoarding has spun out of control and her home now harbours 20 sets of patio furniture. Meanwhile, asthmatic Christina is suffocating under her clutter.

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Adventurer Sir Malcolm invites Bert on an expedition, which Cyril secretly funds for treasure. As Bert seeks adventure and discovery, Cyril’s greed threatens the mission, putting everyone in danger along the way.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril’s failing chip business leads him to stage a fake contest to boost sales. Bert gets caught up and wastes money, realizing too late it’s a scam. The gang must expose the truth before others are tricked as well.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Daredevil biker Bix arrives and impresses Bert, but his reckless actions cause trouble that Cedric gets blamed for. Bert must recognize the difference between excitement and responsibility before friendships are damaged.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: A supposed lake monster draws tourists to Evergreen Forest. Cyril exploits the craze by selling merchandise, while Bert and Melissa investigate the truth behind the sightings and reveal what is really going on.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: The pigs’ mother visits, believing her sons are wealthy. To maintain the lie, they scramble to impress her while hiding the truth. Meanwhile, Cyril faces pressure as their deception spirals out of control.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Melissa captures heroic photos of Snag and gains media attention. As fame grows, Snag is offered a TV role, but must decide if he wants the spotlight or a simpler life with his friends in the forest.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cedric attends school to build confidence but returns overly strict and changed. His new personality causes friction, and both Cyril and the Raccoons must help Cedric rediscover his true self before he loses his identity.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert finds a hidden steam train in the forest, while Cyril learns it holds a fortune. Both race to locate it first, leading to a chase where history, greed, and adventure collide deep within Evergreen Forest.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bentley runs away during a personal crisis and hides at the fort. Meanwhile, Cyril’s new security system malfunctions, trapping him inside his mansion. Both situations spiral until help arrives from unexpected places.

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.desc: Anger, fear and despair are basic human emotions. But when these emotions are coupled with a broken mind, a perfect storm is created. Teetering on the edge of unbalance, these women resort to murder when pushed to the breaking point.

programme.title: Deadly Women: A Daughter's Revenge
programme.desc: Every day, teenage girls are being scolded by their parents, only to respond with tears and slammed bedroom doors. Some daughters won’t take "no" for an answer, and these girls become deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Senseless Slayings
programme.desc: When a person places no value on human life, they can become unstoppable in their twisted missions to destroy the lives around them. These women all pushed boundaries, and shattered lives with their actions.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A daring kidnapping and a bizarre ransom note baffled Mississippi authorities. The victim was the wife of a wealthy businessman. A list of 12 names and a few drops of blood were the only clues to her fate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Many escape the poverty of India to start new lives in the United States. One turned the American dream into a nightmare. People started turning up dead in New York's Indian community-authorities struggled to link fraud and murder to a powerful man.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: When the small community of Noel, Missouri discovered their bank was robbed, they're shocked. When the bank president turned up missing, they're outraged. And when clues began to surface the facts were more terrible than anyone could have guessed.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Murdering Cowboy
programme.desc: The sun set on the Wild West long ago, but some people refused to notice. Claude Dallas was one of them. A wily trapper, Dallas typified the rugged individualism that forged this country. He went too far when he killed two game wardens in 1981.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Predator
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: Cold Blood: What Happened in Vegas?
programme.desc: Single mom Donna Kitowski decides to bake cookies late at night and heads to her local Las Vegas supermarket. But she never comes home. And before long, the local TV news is reporting that a woman’s near-lifeless body has been found in the desert.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Island of Lies
programme.desc: An investigation into a 23-year-old Hawaiian tourist's rape and murder reveals a world of drugs and deception few vacationers ever see. And it's up to one lone detective to get the victims family some justice.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Nightmares in Babysitting
programme.desc: Fourteen-year-old Karen Slattery is brutally stabbed and raped while babysitting in South Florida’s upscale Delray Beach. Police follow up on dozens of tips but the case goes cold.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Close to Home
programme.desc: A fifteen-year-old girl goes to deliver a letter for her parents. Only a few hours later, she is found viciously murdered and left under a slide in a park, only 120 yards from her home. Ansley Common, in Nuneaton, Warwickshire is a close-knit village.

programme.title: Cold Blood: California Girl Gone
programme.desc: On her last day as a high school freshman, a 14-year-old girl is brutally beaten and set on fire. The horrifying crime sends shockwaves through her California community and with a possible serial killer on the loose, investigators hunt for a monster.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Highway to Hell
programme.desc: Investigators believe a serial robber, rapist, and murderer is terrorizing cities up and down the west coast. And as the death toll rises, police jurisdictions in three states join the hunt for the ‘I-5 Killer.’

programme.title: The New Detectives: Loved To Death
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Shattered Vows
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at the bottom of the basement stairs. As detectives look into the accident, they begin to question the sequence of events.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Three hairs microscopic fibers a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial Of The Century
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Settle the Score
programme.desc: When Johnny Crawford is killed in his easy chair, police are perplexed to learn he may have been shot over a musical instrument. It soon becomes clear the young man wasn’t killed for his own sins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: When a young army vet is found stabbed to death on his living room floor, suspicions quickly fall to a neighbor who was arrested during a nearby altercation.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Body in the Freezer
programme.desc: A meeting between two businessmen leaves one shot in the face. Things seem cut and dry until Lt. Kenda realizes the “victim” could actually be the aggressor, shot struggling over his own gun.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Too Young To Die
programme.desc: A frenzied ambush at a hamburger stand leaves a 16-year old boy dead. Lt. Joe Kenda must cut through a mountain of rumor and innuendo in order to zero in on his prime suspect.

programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Once a Pawn a Time
programme.desc: Ton and Allen discover that owning a pawn shop is way more trouble than they expected. With bills stacking up, even an antique ammo collection and some classic football helmets may not be enough to put the guys in the black.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rock-et to Me!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen end up in a turf war at a Hollywood auction and at odds with each other over whether to gamble on what could be an antique slot machine. Allen attempts to fly a jetpack.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen vs. Ton

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Ton and Allen quarrel over bidding strategy at a rare auction on Catalina Island and must race against the clock to unload a one man submersible that could be worth big money… if they can make it work.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Malcolm Webster
programme.desc: The women in Malcolm Webster’s life seemed prone to bad luck. One died in a car crash. Another suffered a mysterious illness. A third, a keen sailor, found her life jacket punctured. How long before police realised this was more than coincidence?

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Stephen Searle
programme.desc: Stephen and Anne Searle were the grandparents at the helm of a large, close-knit family. But Stephen was having an affair, and Anne had been pushed to drink by her husband’s controlling behaviour. Neither was destined to enjoy a peaceful retirement.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ann Marie Anastasi
programme.desc: Ann Marie and Anthony Anastasi had four children, a big house on a desirable street… and a younger lover living in their basement. It was a toxic love triangle, and one that was destined to end in tragedy.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Hannegret Donnelly
programme.desc: The Donnelly family’s neighbours knew they were unusual. Christopher and Hannegret were rarely seen outside the house, and the children were home-schooled. But no one could guess the violence taking place within their home - until it was too late.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Iain Lawrence
programme.desc: Ian and Sally Lawrence were a glamorous couple, and they looked like they had it all. But their marriage suffered when Ian’s star started to fall as Sally’s career rocketed. And when the couple suffered a terrible car crash, only one came out alive.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Chaz Higgs
programme.desc: High-profile politician Kathy Augustine married nurse Chaz Higgs after a whirlwind romance. They were an unlikely match, and when their marriage hit the rocks, Chaz decided to use his medical training to commit an undetectable crime.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Destroy A Planet

programme.title: The New Frontier: Set Course For Heart of the Sun

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Skor needs a brain to complete his latest creation, Frankendino. But the only brain that’s good enough is Edgar’s, so Skor hands Skrap a serrated brain spoon and sends him off to fetch it.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The Final Dreamers travel to Nar, where Edyn is to study with a peculiar spellcaster named Ust while Tony and Strag battle an old foe, Sikan, to find their way to the Guardian Hyren of Nar. Ust's different ways of thinking end up helping to their quest.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: When the Final Hyren quest lands the kids in Bograth, they discover the strange, swamp-laden realm. The rampant void energy poisoning the swamp has changed the Bograthians - and their Guardian Hyren - into mutated, rat-like creatures.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Jet’s skateboard prowess lands him an endorsement deal with a local extreme sports company. The terms of the deal with “Gnarly Sports” requires him to wear the Gnarly Logo on everything, including his Posse gear and weapons.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Family and Me

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Up, Down, and Around!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Riff is asked to be captain of a baseball team, he doesn’t think he can do it. But Barney gives him the courage to try.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is surprised to learn that “The Land of Mother Goose” truly exists. Baby Bop catches Barney, BJ, and Riff wrapping a mysterious present in the caboose, she just can’t wait to see what it is.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Picture of Friendship
programme.desc: After a brief misunderstanding, BJ realizes he has many friends. He enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A-Counting We Will Go!
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Baby Bop count to ten by playing games, and visiting a Make-Believe Market.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: Something's Killing Me

programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes examines an odd story told to him by a member of the 'League of Red-Headed Men'.

programme.desc: A school boy vandalizes church steps with faculty names, that are then later found dead.

programme.desc: The teams have 20 minutes to see which team can produce the most shrimp dumplings; rapper The Game attends the dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Kris Jenner and Dita Von Teese enjoy duck dishes as one team pulls off a near-perfect dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The winners of this week's challenge enjoy a wine blending experience, before a disastrous dinner service leads to a shock departure.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Operation Heart
programme.desc: The IMF races against time to convince the president (Pernell Roberts) of a small country that his chief of secret police plans to overthrow the government and seize power.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Slave pt. 1
programme.desc: The IMF is called upon to end an inhuman situation which the United Nations has been unable to abolish: slave trade in the country of Elkabar, ruled by King Ibn Borca.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Slave pt. 2
programme.desc: The IMF continues to battle slave-trading in a Middle Eastern country by eliminating De Groot, one of the principal suppliers of victims for King Borca's slave market.

programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is asked to destroy an international narcotics ring operated by Alex Cresnic and his partner Mark Walters.

programme.desc: The economy of the small African country of Ghalea is threatened by a mass counterfeiting scheme directed by Walter DuBruis, one of the country's richest financiers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Ton and Allen quarrel over bidding strategy at a rare auction on Catalina Island and must race against the clock to unload a one man submersible that could be worth big money… if they can make it work.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Always Money in Philadelphia
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, the guys face a shady bidder with inside information and former NFL star Vince Papale in a battle for a vintage football passing machine and a colonial musket that could be worth huge money if it's real.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: With Ton missing, Allen struggles to keep the pawn shop afloat while training Elle to work an auction. After a fierce bidding war with Caroline, pieces from a century old motorcycle may not be enough to save the day. ed.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.desc: When a group of thugs try to bully Ton and Allen out of a Chinatown auction, the guys fight back, leading to a violent showdown and the discovery of both a rare Bornean blowgun and special effects wire harnesses.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Missouri Loves Company
programme.desc: On a visit to see Ton's sister in Missouri for some rafting and relaxation, the guys hit up a fast-paced live auction. After some tough losses, Ton and Allen score a ballista and an anvil set made for an explosive sport.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Home Possession

programme.title: A Haunting: Conjuring Evil

programme.title: A Haunting: Grave Awakenings
programme.desc: When ghosts confront Zoe Dei, she makes the harrowing discovery that her home harbors a paranormal portal which has awakened her dormant ability as psychic medium, forcing her to learn how to live with her newfound ability to see the dead.

programme.title: A Haunting: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Strange sounds and eerie sensations lead Charles Gonzales to suspect that a spirit haunts his Florida home. Charles asks Desiree to investigate his home. There, Desiree encounters the vicious spirit who seeks to keep Charles in its clutches forever.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a single mother with a history of heart problems is found dead, detectives assume she died of natural causes. But as the investigation deepens, detectives begin to believe foul play was involved.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Devoted mother Heather Strong disappears, leaving her estranged husband Josh to care for her two children, as he also falls under suspicion.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a loving wife and mother is found shot to death in her own bed, the case goes cold for two years until determined detectives set their sights on justice and reveal a murder-for-hire plot.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.desc: Denise Williams was devastated when her husband Mike disappeared on a hunting trip. He was feared drowned. But Mike’s mother Cheryl didn’t buy it, and after years of relentless campaigning, she finally uncovered the truth about her son’s death.

programme.desc: Kelly and George Worgan looked like the perfect parents, playing happy families on Facebook with pictures of days out. But behind closed doors, they had financial struggles and rows. When their marriage ended in murder, no one saw it coming.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Tia Young

programme.desc: Today, Dog's bounty is about to take him on a trip down memory lane and test his investigative chops. With each lead propelling him closer and closer to his childhood haunts, Dog uses old-fashioned detective skills to track his prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: One for the Road

programme.desc: Duty calls and the Chapmans are off on a hunt. The team chases a fugitive who has disappeared into a world of "no known addresses."

programme.desc: On a full moon, a stranger sets up an erotic photo shoot on a neighbor's porch; two Floridian landscapers are shocked when a woman begins hurling insults; a tenant becomes incensed by his landlord's unannounced visits and decides to lock her out.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Sacramento, a neighbor mistakenly believes two women exchanging hair products in the park are actually selling drugs; a belligerent woman smashes her neighbor's window in Virginia; neighbors in Canada clash about a lawn care specialist.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A woman allegedly sets her home on fire while a neighbor is inside; a man calls for backup from his friends after arguing with his neighbor over car noise; a hero with a recycling bin saves a Florida neighborhood threatened by an angry alligator.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A sleep-deprived Texan accuses her neighbor of being an agent bent on stealing her computer; a Brooklyn man decides to tow his neighbor's poorly-parked car; a mysterious hole appears in an apartment wall shared between two neighbors in Kansas.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars

programme.title: Danger Mouse

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Bigfoot
programme.desc: Two prominent Bigfoot trackers and a cryptozoologist affirm the existence of this shy and elusive creature and relate several close encounters with Sasquatch.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets members of the 9/11 Truth movement who challenge the official version of events concerning the attack on the U.S. Pentagon. Researchers present evidence to suggest the attack was perpetrated by some rogue element inside the U.S. government.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: UNEXPLAINED MESSAGES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysterious unexplained messages from the past including the Nazca Lines, the Voynich Manuscript, the Flower of Life, Puma Punku, Leonardo Da Vinci's paintings.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Had a mysterious German prospector, known as the Dutchman, found the richest gold mine in America? When he died keeping the mine’s location secret, Dick Holmes - a young cowhand - went on a quest to track it down.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: EXTRA TERRESTRIAL
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries explores extraterrestrial phenomena like ship and aircraft vanishings, Area 51, close encounters, classified projects.

programme.title: Vampire Island
programme.desc: Two suspected vampire graves.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: ANCIENT MEGASTRUCTURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at ancient megastructures including the Olmec Heads of Central America, Moai of Eastern Island, Petra in modern day Jordan, the Alhambra in Spain, Angkor Wat in Cambodia, Chichen Itza.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Global Warming, A Hoax?
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several journalists and researchers who argue the theory that human use of carbon-based fossil fuels will lead to catastrophic global warming.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Bank Robbers
programme.desc: Bank robbers. They are clever, planning their crimes for years. And if necessary, they even put human lives at risk. For investigators, each heist is different. But all robbers have one thing in common: they steal millions.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: The Fall of Constantinople
programme.desc: April 1453. The Ottomans, led by Sultan Mehmed II, lay siege to the city of Constantinople.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Uffizi Gallery, Florence
programme.desc: From a famous artist who vanished to a traitorous Nazi who saved the day, discover the secrets inside the Uffizi Gallery.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Palacio Real, Madrid
programme.desc: From a clock that runs on witchcraft to a 21st Century king who outfoxes a fascist, discover the secrets inside the Palacio Real.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul
programme.desc: From assassins who plot to poison a Sultan to bitter enemies who sign the world’s first peace treaty, discover the secrets inside the Topkapi Palace Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Chateau of Versailles, Paris
programme.desc: From the schemes of Marie Antoinette to the spectrum of a star that reveals the origin of human life, discover the secrets inside the Chateau of Versailles.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Destroy A Planet
programme.desc: The Earth is built to last. It is a 4,550,000,000-year-old, 5,973,600,000,000,000,000,000-tonne ball of rock and iron. It has taken more devastating asteroid hits in its lifetime than you've had hot dinners, and it still orbits happily around the sun.

programme.title: scienceNOW: What's the Next Big Thing?
programme.desc: Examine scientific breakthroughs that could contribute to a better understanding of ourselves and our place in the universe: Social Robots; Robotic Cars; Detecting Earthquakes; Smart Grid; and a profile of biologist Jay Keasling.

programme.title: Naked Science: Jupiter
programme.desc: By far the largest planet, 1300 times the size of Earth, it’s a world so enormous it could swallow every planet and moon in the solar system and still have room to spare.

programme.title: Wonders: Can We Make Life?
programme.desc: New tools allow researchers to use cells to create and edit their own DNA with more ease and less cost than ever before. NOVA Wonders explores the benefits and the burden of risk surrounding this controversial new technology.

programme.title: scienceNOW: How Smart Can We Get?
programme.desc: How Smart Can We Get? How do you get a genius brain? Is it all in the genes? Or is it hard work? Episodes include: Einstein's Brain; Mystery of the Savant Brain; What is Intelligence?; and Profile: Sian Beilock.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: The New Frontier: Martian Attractions
programme.desc: The Latest in Martian exploration from orbit and on the ground, new sources of water and planetary dust storms are a few of the stories unfolding on to the Red Planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Getting There
programme.desc: Launching payloads into space is a very difficult task, historically rocket launches are the proverbial 'swords into ploughshares'.

programme.title: The New Frontier: First Light
programme.desc: For an instrument first developed as recently as the 17th century, the telescope has travelled a long way.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: RISING TIDES
programme.desc: The next generation of Earth observation satellites are now in place maintaining the continuity of long-term climate data, in particular the planets rising temperatures and related ocean levels.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Stars Above
programme.desc: Stars are a bit like human beings. They can be warm or cold, they come in all kinds of shapes and sizes.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: London: 2000 Years Of History
programme.desc: How the Crossrail will propel the capital into the future.

programme.title: Portillo's Hidden History Of Britain: Royal London Hospital
programme.desc: The Royal London Hospital pioneered medical breakthroughs.

programme.title: Portillo's Hidden History Of Britain: Orford Ness: Defence of the Realm
programme.desc: Orford Ness is a lens into an era of secrets and superpowers.

programme.title: Portillo's Hidden History Of Britain: Shepton Mallet
programme.desc: Michael Portillo explores this 400-year-old prison.

programme.title: The Flying Scotsman: The Unstoppable Flying Scotsman
programme.desc: The Flying Scotsman has broken records and starred in movies.

programme.title: The Flying Scotsman
programme.desc: The mighty Scotsman becomes stranded stateside.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.desc: Newsmagazine with features focusing on people, and events in the news and behind the headlines.

programme.title: Face the Nation

programme.title: CBS News Roundup

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Aims High/Flaw and Order
programme.desc: D.W. wants to be the first person to set foot on Mars! But what if scary purple aliens eat her? Who's responsible for cracking Dad's cake platter? DUN-DUN! All the evidence points to Arthur!

programme.title: Arthur: All Thumbs/Kidonia
programme.desc: When Arthur catches Buster sucking his thumb, Buster worries that Arthur will tell the entire school. Tired of doing chores, Arthur and friends decide to invent their own country. Will this kid-ruled utopia flourish or descend into anarchy?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Dummy Disaster/Francine and The Feline
programme.desc: When painfully shy George brings a ventriloquist dummy to school, a popular kid is born! Then, Arthur thinks the best pet to have is a dog, and Francine probably would have agreed--that is, until little Nemo, a cute kitten, came along.

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Big Top Trouble/George Blows His Top
programme.desc: Francine is sure she will be a star at circus camp. How hard could it be? Then, George is always more than happy to lend his pals whatever they need. But Buster's borrowing gets out of control.

programme.title: Arthur: Mom and Dad Have A Great Big Fight/D.W.'s Perfect Wish
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad fight over spilled milk, Arthur and D.W. fear the worst. Is it Arthur's fault or D.W.'s? Then, turning five is a major, big deal event! But D.W. worries that she fribbled away her preschool years on meaningless pursuits.

programme.title: Arthur: Fern and the Case of the Stolen Story/Sue Ellen Vegges Out
programme.desc: Fern has writer's block! Fortunately, Ladonna's full of stories, and Fern decides to "borrow" the tales and simply change the names. Then, when Sue Ellen decides to stop eating meat, Muffy and Francine compete to be the best vegetarian.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Tooth/D.W. Gets Lost
programme.desc: It's bad enough to wear glasses all the time. But does Arthur have to be the last person in his class to lose his baby teeth? Then, if you think being lost in a humongous department store would scare a four-year-old, think again.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Thinks Big/Arthur Cleans Up
programme.desc: Once again, Arthur gets to do everything. Mostly he gets to carry the ring in Aunt Lucy's wedding. Elwood City's park is in sad shape, and after grumbling about it, the kids find themselves volunteered to clean it up.

programme.title: Arthur: Hide And Snake/Muffy's New Best Friend
programme.desc: The kids capture a snake and learn that it's possibly poisonous--after it gets lost in Arthur's house! Why is Muffy interviewing for a new best friend? She and Francine are usually inseparable, but lately it seems they have less in common.

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: The Legacy
programme.desc: Experience this groundbreaking film, the story of the greatest sea disaster in U.S. Navy History, told for the first time by only the men who lived it.

programme.title: Field of Valor
programme.desc: It was becoming clear in 1939 that direct U.S. involvement in World War Two was only a matter of time. Training approximately 500 to 750 pilots a year, the United States Army Air Corps was severely outmatched by the warring powers of Europe and Asia.

programme.title: Destroy Paris: Hitler's Secret Plan
programme.desc: By 1944, as the Reich was crumbling, Hitler gave detailed orders for the destruction of Paris. He wanted the monuments and all the bridges mined and the city reduced to a 'pile of rubble'.

programme.title: The Real Hunt for Red October: Part 2
programme.desc: Film lifting the lid on the secret events surrounding the Russian submarine, Red October, that went missing in 1968, and which brought the Soviet Union and US to the brink of war.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: A 23-year-old Hitler, living hand-to-mouth as a painter in Vienna, Austria, discovers a sacred spear in the city's Hofburg Museum

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Veterans and historians of the Thai-Burma railway tell the story of its construction. Built to supply Japan’s invasion of India, it cost thousands of lives – both POWs and Asian slave labourers.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Sex Life: Body Image
programme.desc: Hitler wanted the world to believe he possessed super-human qualities but in private he was a wreck. This episode reveals the archives that confirm Hitler’s genital deformity, the alarming truth about his heavy drug addiction and the Parkinson’s.

programme.title: Hell On Earth WWII
programme.desc: The bloodiest months of the war are still ahead. A Soviet surge pushes German forces back to within 30 kilometres of the Polish Border. The siege at Leningrad is lifted after 900 days and Operation Overlord, D-Day, opens a second front in Europe.

programme.desc: Using a local car dealership, 15 Division runs a sting operation to crack down on suspects with outstanding warrants. One of the criminals they capture tries to bargain for a lighter sentence

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The One That Got Away

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: After flashbacks of an alien abduction lead him to attempt suicide, Eddie Wexler (Michael O'Keefe) is institutionalized, with a doctor who seems intent on forcing him to relive his memories. Is Eddie insane? Or is the doctor more than he seems?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: As he celebrates his first anniversary, Norman (Matt Frewer) thinks he's the luckiest man alive. But suddenly, his lovely wife doesn't seem the same and he can't stand to be around her. Is he going crazy or are his instincts telling him something?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Problem child Rusty (Ryan Phillippe) finds himself thrown into a private school bent on straightening him out with some unorthodox methods. Rusty has eluded their control so far, but can he escape from this prison of the mind?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: Robbery
programme.desc: Dramatisation of one of the most audacious robberies of all time.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories
programme.desc: Music icon Paula Abdul brings psychic medium Kim Russo back to her former California home where she was troubled by incessant spirits.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories
programme.desc: TV personality and "The Real Housewives of Atlanta" star NeNe Leakes joins psychic medium Kim Russo to investigate paranormal events connected to a wedding she attended in Atlanta, GA.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: Tom Arnold takes his teenage anger out on a pipe organ, angering a revengeful spirit; Dee Snider's murdered brother-in-law has a message from the grave.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Who’s Hurting My Granddaughter?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Jackie’s family doesn't trust her boyfriend around her children, but she insists on staying with him. What horrible truth will Shaqualla's lie detector test reveal about her man?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Can't Face The Truth.
programme.desc: Today Danny is finally ready to face the missing man in his life and get answers to lifelong questions. Steven offers a number of excuses for not seeing his son, but can we redeem himself?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Crawl to Your Wife
programme.desc: After surviving a wild car chase, losing her leg, and being comatose due to her husband, Portia will finally confront him. He won't admit fault, but today Steve’s helping Portia find her voice.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: The 1000th Episode!
programme.desc: On the 1000th episode, we'll bring you all of the crazy confessions, explosive meltdowns, chair throws, funny moments and the heartfelt stories that have made this show special!

programme.desc: Steve’s hosting another teen girl town hall to address critical issues all teen girls could face, including drug use, physical abuse, and online predators. No question is off limits!

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Visiting a home of high nobility, a businessman is murdered.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Impromptu Performance

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Neurotic Detective
programme.desc: Watson believes Holmes is a criminal mastermind, but all is not as it seems.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Woman In Green

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The winners of this week's challenge enjoy a wine blending experience, before a disastrous dinner service leads to a shock departure.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams must create six unique dishes for former sous chef Andi; while the challenge winners spend the night in Las Vegas, the losing team makes a mountain of macaroons; dinner service has the contestants cooking for Andi's wedding reception.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's gruelling chef challenge continues. The ten remaining chefs are challenged to create unique dishes with a limited number of ingredients.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants compete in a bison-dish challenge that tests their archery and cooking skills. Plus, it's cowboy steak night with special guests news commentator Stacey Dash and Olympic gold medallist Phil Dalhausser.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken Out
programme.desc: Was Donovan Reidy deliberately run down and left to die? In 1995, 23-year-old Donovan Reidy was at a party when he got into a fight. A short while later, his bloodied body was found on the side of a major New Zealand highway.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: In Too Deep
programme.desc: In 1999, Kiwi engineer Aaron Hopa and his English colleague Robert Glazzard were murdered on board a survey ship in the Persian Gulf in.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: Jim Donnelly was a hard-working family man living a quiet life in suburban Auckland. For 20 years he’d worked as a scientist at the Glenbrook Steel Mill, south of Auckland. On the 21st of June 2004, he simply vanished into thin air.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: Our new team of “ Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to unmask the killer – or killers – of vivacious New Zealand hairdresser Paula Brown who was plucked from Sydney’s downtown after a night out with friends.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Sloss Furnaces

programme.desc: When Moesha borrows money from Frank to buy a mother’s day present for Dee, but only gives Dee socks, Frank is upset.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Sexism And The City Episode

programme.desc: After finding out that her rival, Naomi Dawson is giving Spencer the cold shoulder, Mona immediately confronts her, and Naomi reveals to Spencer that she is HIV positive.

programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Brew-Phoria

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Almost a decade after Californian student Lynsie Ekelund went missing, detectives call the main suspect's bluff when they find human remains at the construction site he worked at.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a hard-working Virginia couple is brutally murdered on the eve of their anniversary, the ensuing investigation goes cold until detectives find the most unlikely of suspects.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.desc: By arranging a rendezvous between Klink and Burkhalter's sister, Hogan can slip out of camp and destroy a train.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bounty Baby

programme.desc: Richard speaks with several journalists and researchers who argue the theory that human use of carbon-based fossil fuels will lead to catastrophic global warming.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Freemasons
programme.desc: Are the Freemasons a harmless fraternity whose members busy themselves by raising money for children's hospitals or a satanic cult whose tentacles and enslave mankind?

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: HUMAN SACRIFICES
programme.desc: Human sacrifice, practiced since the Paleolithic era, was seen as a gift to gods for cosmic order. Found in black magic, voodoo, and Satanism, these rituals may hint at a mysterious connection to higher forces.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Ouija Boards?
programme.desc: Harmless board game or portal to the spirit world? Richard delves into the history and folklore of 'talking boards' with a collector of Ouija boards and a world renowned paranormal investigator.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Phoenix Lights
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1997, an extraordinary event occurred across the state of Arizona that has become the subject of great debate in the UFO community.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Birthers - Obama's Birth Certificate
programme.desc: Richard interviews several prominent 'Birthers' who present evidence that proves Barack Obama is not eligible to be President because he does not meet the qualifications of a natural born citizen.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Fluoride
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show investigates the safety and efficacy of putting fluoride in our water supply. Dentists say that putting fluoride in the water supply prevents tooth decay, but some researchers claim it's a toxic substance that causes cancer.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET TECHNOLOGIES
programme.desc: Scientists, engineers, military, and intelligence agencies push boundaries with unlimited budgets and secrecy. This episode unveils known (or suspected) top-secret projects.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Historian Michael Hesemann sought to authenticate the Titulus Crucis, believed to be a piece of Christ's cross. Displayed in a Rome church, it spans from Jerusalem to modern Rome, backed by records since the 1400s.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Chateau of Versailles, Paris
programme.desc: From the schemes of Marie Antoinette to the spectrum of a star that reveals the origin of human life, discover the secrets inside the Chateau of Versailles.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem
programme.desc: From a scientist who recreates the crucifixion to an ancient amulet that proves Star Trek's Spock is Jewish, discover the secrets inside the Israel Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Metropolitan Museum, New York
programme.desc: From the mystery of a king’s madness to a silver chalice some think is the Holy Grail, discover the secrets inside the Metropolitan Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Imperial War Museum, London
programme.desc: From Churchill risking his life in the Blitz to 21st Century soldiers who become invisible, discover the secrets inside the Imperial War Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Museum of Anthropology, Mexico City
programme.desc: From ancient athletes who kick a severed head to a peasant dress that brings down an empire, discover the secrets inside the National Museum of Anthropology.

programme.title: scienceNOW: How Smart Can We Get?
programme.desc: How Smart Can We Get? How do you get a genius brain? Is it all in the genes? Or is it hard work? Episodes include: Einstein's Brain; Mystery of the Savant Brain; What is Intelligence?; and Profile: Sian Beilock.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: VOLCANOES
programme.desc: Volcanoes are Earth’s geologic architects. They’ve created more than 80 percent of our planet’s surface and their explosive force has crafted both mountains and craters.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: HURRICANES
programme.desc: Hurricanes, Typhoons and Cyclones all the same thing with different names – what they also have in common is their destructive power! Hurricanes are large, swirling storms and winds from a hurricane can damage buildings or trees.

programme.title: Naked Science: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second-largest planet in the solar system. Storms on this gas giant can cover an area bigger than the United States Clouds of the gas race around the planet at over 1000 miles per hour generating fierce electrical storms and lightning.

programme.title: Wonders: What are Animals Saying?
programme.desc: NOVA Wonders travels around the globe, where researchers are deciphering an amazing array of clues that reveal how animals share information critical to their survival.

programme.title: Wonders: What's Living in You?
programme.desc: NOVA Wonders discovers a whole new paradigm for understanding how the human body works and opens up a new world of microbial forensics.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Apollo Program Begins - At the very beginning of NASA's moon project things go wrong. Caves - ESA's special training program for astronauts. Planck - Mapping the cosmic microwave background radiation.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Tickets Please
programme.desc: No spacecraft have traveled so fast or so close to a star before. It is hoped to reveal the source of the solar winds that effect us here on Earth

programme.title: The New Frontier: From There To Here
programme.desc: Series introduction and the study of Earth from orbit.

programme.title: The New Frontier: GIANTS IN THE DARK
programme.desc: Asteroids, the debris from the early solar system hold tantalizing clues to planetary formation. The spacecraft Psyche readies to study a unique metallic asteroid.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Cold War & The Start of the Space Race - Cold War rivalry and the acceleration of space exploration. Servicing Hubble - Preparations for Hubble's final servicing mission. Chasing a Comet - Launch and the difficult path to rendezvous.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Ice Giants
programme.desc: Beyond the asteroid belt lay the ice giants, some can be seen with the naked eye, others only glimpsed once by a passing probe.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini Commences - Did Gemini give the US a lead in the space race? Venus Express - The last days of ESA's Venus probe. EMU - NASA's Extravehicular Mobility Unit. Deep Space Communications - ESA's worldwide network of giant dishes.

programme.desc: The crew of Delta Airlines Flight 191 see rain and lightning up ahead, but fly on. Inside the storm, their plane is hit by powerful winds that slam the plane to the ground. 136 people die.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: An inexplicable failure strikes – the loss of two engines on a brand new passenger jet. Powerless at 30,000 ft, the pilot needs all his skill, and a little bit of luck, to get his plane to the airport

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: In the Costa Blanca, a family of expats moves into their new home. In France, two gite owners race against time to renovate their barn. And a worrying start in business for a Somerset yoga teacher whose dream to run retreats hangs in the balance.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A mother and daughter team running a home furnishings shop in the Costa Blanca branch out. There’s a tight turnaround for a couple of British gite owners. Follow two best friends from England with a dream of opening a cookery school in the Cote d’Azur.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: It’s crunch time for the expats setting up new businesses in Europe. In the Cote d’Azur, the future of a new cookery school hangs in the balance. A home furnishing business looks for a new challenge.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple from Kent sink their savings into building a holiday business in Tarn et Garonne. A husband-and-wife team take on the challenge of turning a cave house into a cool bed & breakfast in Spain. And a Londoner gets a reality check.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: The launch of one expats bar in the south of France is under threat from the weather. For a Dorset couple, renovations at their cave house prove to be trickier than they thought. And business is slow for a couple running holiday homes in France.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Cashing in on football fever in the bar on the Cote d’Azur. Four-legged guests boost one couple of expats business in France, and can a husband and wife team from Dorset be ready in time for guests in their cave house bed & breakfast?

programme.title: Trapped
programme.desc: Without food, trapped on a mountain, these plane crash survivors must resort to the unthinkable.

programme.title: Monster Waves
programme.desc: Few choose to face them. Few try to understand them. And even fewer can survive "Monster Waves."

programme.title: Twister Chasers
programme.desc: Take a wild ride with tornado chasers as they traverse the American Midwest.

programme.title: Killer Asteroid
programme.desc: Can a new generation of cutting-edge space missions face the ultimate natural disaster?

programme.title: Boeing 737 Max: What Went Wrong?
programme.desc: How did the fastest-selling aircraft in Boeing's history, the Boeing 737 MAX, end its run in two tragedies?

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: While in Vash Naroom, the kids discover that Gorgram has offered a challenge to his Shadow Magi: whoever gets Orwin's Staff, becomes his second-in-command! Edyn has to use her knowledge of her realm to defeat the eager Shadow Magi.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Duh'Rehka / Chore Leave
programme.desc: While chasing his gopher-nemesis, Sawyer gets zapped into his brain bin and emerges super smart!

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Jet is suffering from terrible W.O. – Wing Odor – and it’s making all the other Posse members nuts. No matter how much under-wing deodorant he uses, he still stinks.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Jungle
programme.desc: The newest minicon activates in the middle of a forest: both sides fight for it, and the conflict sets the trees alight. The Autobots attempt to battle the blaze, while Starscream finally acquires his own minicon.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Cheeks of Dread / Doo Doo Doomsday
programme.desc: Gretchen must confront her greatest and cutest fear.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Seven Foot itch / Being McGee
programme.desc: Squirt ressurects his pet lousy from the grave.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: While traveling To Arderial to persuade the Guardian Hyren to join their quest, the Final Dreamers discover that the cloud-dwelling Arderialites aren't impressed with their past exploits.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Cramp
programme.desc: To convince Galvatron he must ally with Optimus to prevent Unicron taking over the universe, Starscream makes the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Skor plans to flatten Megalopolis with a massive, 60-story tall rock, but he suddenly has no one to help him push the rock down his mountain. His normally-subservient army of Links has run off in disgust over being fed the wrong meal at lunchtime.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: In the fantastical world of the Moonlands, a pair of heroic Magi, Aidan and Elle, battle Agram, a villainous Shadow Magi. Utilizing the Dreamstones in the cover of the Book of Elders, they form the Core Glyph, a magical entrapment that locks Agram away.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sweeter Than Candy
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ are helping the park kids get ready for a school play. When Barney tells everyone that putting on shows began in Greece, they want to go visit! While there, they meet some friends and decide to put on a play in an amphitheatre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: China - Welcome, Cousin Riff
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. The letter reveals that his pen pal is coming for a visit. With the help of friends in the park, BJ hurries to get the park ready.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Three Lines, Three Corners
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Making a Move
programme.desc: Welcome to the neighborhood! Anna has just moved to the neighborhood and is missing her old friends. Barney and his friends help her discover that moving is an adventure with new places to explore and new friends to meet.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Home Sweet Earth
programme.desc: It's Earth Day, a great time for everyone to learn how to help take car of our world, but Ben is wasting paper while BJ isn't too concerned about cutting down a tree to make room for a new playground.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Imagine That!
programme.desc: While Baby Bop and BJ are pretending to be pirates, Barney creates a magical island for their fantastic adventure. Together they discover ways to have fun while playing dress up, pretending, and being silly.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ’s efforts to decorate the park go awry when he accidentally paints the caboose several different colors. Baby Bop can’t wait for BJ and Riff to go on their camping trip.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Bird of a Different Feather
programme.desc: Barney takes the kids to Hawaii on a quest for a bird of paradise. While there, they meet some friends, learn new Hawaiian words, make a Hawaiian lei and dance a hula! Eventually, Barney and his friends find a bird of paradise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Corporate Raiders From Dimension X
programme.desc: Shredder utilizes a hypnotizing device and creates zombies out of CEOs all over the city. Ultimately, the plan is to raise the Technodrome from the centre of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Pizza By The Shred
programme.desc: In order to locate the Turtles' lair and destroy them, Shredder opens a pizza parlour. When the Turtles order a pizza, Shredder places a locator-tracking device on it disguised as an anchovy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Super Bebop & Mighty Rocksteady
programme.desc: Krang creates Cybernetic Clones of Rocksteady, only ten times as strong and ten times as smart.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Blast From the Past
programme.desc: Shredder endeavours to enlist the aid of the ghost of Shibano-Sama, a noble warrior who lived hundreds of years ago, to destroy the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leatherhead: Terror of the Swamp
programme.desc: The Turtles go south to the swamps when their friends the Frogs -and Napoleon Bonafrog - are in trouble. The source of their predicament is Leatherhead, a half-human, half-alligator mutation.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo's Birthday
programme.desc: It's Michelangelo's birthday - and his good buddies are pretending they're unaware of it.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Usagi Yojimbo
programme.desc: Shredder's Teleporter, which can teletransport objects to a pre­determined location, interferes with Donatello's transdimensional reception - and Usagi Yojimbo, a 14th century Samurai rabbit, pops out of the Turtles' screen.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Case of the Hot Kimono
programme.desc: Agatha Marble helps the Turtles in their pursuit of Don Turtelli, including Splinter's treasured red robe - and holding Happy Hour News' April and Vernon prisoners.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Usagi, Come Home
programme.desc: Shredder has a hare-brained scheme to turn the rabbit from another dimension, Usagi Yojimbo, into an ally of his and an enemy of the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Making of Metalhead
programme.desc: Krang creates Metalhead, an exact robot replica of the Turtles with even more powers, and directs him to destroy the Turtles. Donatello, however, reprograms Metalhead over to the Turtles' side.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When a family’s home is threatened by the Corsola who live nearby, it’s Ash and friends to the rescue…and maybe Misty can finally catch that Corsola she’s been after!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: After our heroes miss a ferry, they meet a diver who offers to take them to the next island…but they’re soon distracted by tales of treasure aboard a sunken ship!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When they’re not competing in the Whirl Cup, Ash and Misty try to help a young Trainer whose Octillery has been rejected by its Remoraid friends after evolving.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: After winning their preliminary rounds, Ash and Misty face formidable opponents in the Whirl Cup. Meanwhile, the Team Rocket trio have their eyes on stealing the tournament’s prize!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: It’s the second round of the Whirl Cup, and Ash and Misty have been paired up against each other! Who will come out on top? And will Team Rocket’s plan to distract the police be successful?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Our heroes are asked to help protect a village from marauders who threaten to make off with the Diglett who live there—and thanks to a delicious dinner, Team Rocket offers to help, too!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a jewelry maker who tells them the legend of the fourth Whirl Island…and who soon finds himself embroiled in a Team Rocket plot!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: While two sets of Team Rocket villains set out to capture the Legendary Pokémon Lugia, Ash runs into his old friend Richie and his partner, a Pikachu named Sparky!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The little Lugia named Silver has fallen into the hands of Butch and Cassidy of Team Rocket, and with Richie's help, Ash must win the adult Lugia’s trust before it gets caught in the same trap!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: While trying to rescue the two Lugia from Team Rocket, Ash and friends have been taken prisoner! Now, they must figure out a way to escape…and to free the captured Pokémon as well!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Ash and friends are on a plane back to Olivine City when they get caught in a terrible storm that also sweeps up Team Rocket’s balloon! They’ll have to work together to land safely…but can they manage it?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises & makes lovely roaring sounds, Dipsy & Laa-Laa laugh and run away. Some children pretend to be different animals and guess what they are. Tinky Winky hears a big roar and runs away.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po pops up between Dipsy and Tinky Winky. They join Laa-Laa to watch two girls go for a tram ride around San Francisco. Laa-Laa and Po go for a walk. Laa-Laa goes the quick way and Po goes the long way.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up to say hello before they gather round to watch some children learn about the number nine. Po and Tinky Winky count nine flowers that appear in Teletubbyland and then run off to fin Dipsy and Laa-Laa and dance the Bump dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies appear one at a time to say ‘Eh-oh’. They watch some children playing with bubbles. It’s time for Tubby Custard. The custard machine makes a funny noise, and a tubby custard bubble comes out followed by more.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Daniel and Stephanie make big round pancakes. They are having a round and round day. They run round and round in Teletubbyland, but they stop to see the dancing bear in the Carousel, then there's time for one more dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a Spanish girl play her violin for her friends. In Teletubbyland the Teletubbies watch Po dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love to eat Tubby Custard, but Po spills hers on the floor and the Noo-Noo cleans up the mess.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a magical, musical message for Po. The Teletubbies watch two children whose father is a lighthouse keeper, and learn that lighthouses have lots of steps.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises to teach Dipsy a nursery rhyme. The Teletubbies watch two children playing with water. It rains in Teletubbyland, and makes a puddle.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa run into Home Hill to say 'Eh-oh', but where 's Po? Some children help their dad to wash his car. They get very wet and soapy.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: King Mario of Cramalot

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: True Colors/Recycled Koopa
programme.desc: King Koopa drops paint on the Mushroom people, turning some red and others blue./The Koopa kids clean up the castle and dump all their junk into a warp pipe.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Mind Your Mummy Mommy, Mario/The Beauty Of Kootie
programme.desc: Hip and Hop steal the golden mummy case of Prince Mushroom-khamen, a dead ringer for Mario. King Koopa is siphoning off all the oil from Desertland to power his doomship!

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario's Magic Carpet
programme.desc: Mario and Co are traveling through a desert, dying of thirst. Thanks to a boobytrap, they wind up in the palace of Sultan Pasbah, who tries to force Princess into his harem, while the guys are sent to the dungeon.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Hooded Robin and his Mario Men
programme.desc: While searching for a place known as Sharewood Village, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool find themselves lost in Sharewood Forest; as Mario, Luigi and Princess Toadstool stand nearby, Toad begins to glance at his map to Sharewood Village

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Brooklyn Bound
programme.desc: In the Snow World, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool, exhausted and hungry, weakly venture forth through a snowy field, mentioning that the hoards of Koopa Khan are after them.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Count Koopula
programme.desc: In a dark forest, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are running frantically through pouring rain, in a mysterious place called Turtlevania.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Butch Mario & The Luigi Kid
programme.desc: While trying to rescue the Princess from an abandoned mine, the Mario brothers find themselves running from Sheriff Mouser and his minions who are after the large reward Koopa has promised for their capture.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Toadally Magical Adventure/Misadventures In Babysitting
programme.desc: Toad is toadally infatuated with the Wizard King's new magic wand. / The Mario Brothers are warped into a Brooklyn apartment and are appointed as babysitters.

programme.title: The Way Back: The Way Back (2011)
programme.desc: A small band of convicts stage a daring escape from a World War II-era Siberian gulag, and embark on a treacherous journey across five countries in a race for freedom and survival.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: Benji
programme.desc: Two school kids strike up a friendship with an orphaned puppy named Benji. When danger befalls them and they end up kidnapped by robbers who are in over their heads, Benji and his scruffy sidekick come to the rescue.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Greatest: Best of Season IV WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic
programme.desc: We revisit the final table at season four's, Five Diamond World Poker Classic from Bellagio in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Best of Season VII WPT Festa al Lago
